title: hedeoma johnstonii
intro: Hedeoma johnstonii, also known as Mountain Pinks or Pink Balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant is valued for its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which are often used to treat skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The medicinal properties of Hedeoma johnstonii have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting against infections, and promoting wound healing. Hedeoma johnstonii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, salves, and infusions, which are used topically to soothe skin conditions and internally to boost overall health.
